# Standards — ENG domain

This index lists every JOS-canonical standard declared under the `eng` domain. Source of truth: jordan-operating-system repo.

**Count:** 7

| ID | Title | Stage | Flexibility | Summary |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| [JOS-S09](JOS-S09-architecture-decision-record-standard.md) | Architecture Decision Record Standard | adopt | expected | Define what good architecture decision documentation looks like so teams can reason about past choices. |
| [JOS-S10](JOS-S10-dependency-governance-standard.md) | Dependency Governance Standard | adopt | expected | Define what good dependency management looks like so systems remain composable and maintainable. |
| [JOS-S11](JOS-S11-incident-learning-standard.md) | Incident Learning Standard | adopt | expected | Define what good incident learning looks like so organizations extract maximum value from failures. |
| [JOS-S12](JOS-S12-observability-standard.md) | Observability Standard | adopt | expected | Define what good system observability looks like so operators can diagnose behavior in production. |
| [JOS-S13](JOS-S13-technology-lifecycle-standard.md) | Technology Lifecycle Standard | adopt | expected | Define what good technology lifecycle management looks like so organizations make deliberate technology choices. |
| [JOS-S14](JOS-S14-verification-standard.md) | Verification Standard | adopt | expected | Define what good verification looks like so changes are validated before reaching production. |
| [JOS-S53](JOS-S53-architecture-conformance-standard.md) | Architecture Conformance Standard | assess | expected | Define what good structure-to-architecture alignment looks like so a system's code stays organized around its declared architecture instead of drifting into undeclared catch-all groupings. |
